title: Fake Armor
description: Craft cheap & stackable  non-functional Fake Armor to decorate your Armor Stands
body:
![image showing fake armor logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1ee78f9a659e8bed6a400f2ba44a0e40091915b.png)
All that glitters is not gold. ## 🤔 How does it work? Craft Fake armor like any other Armor, but use Dye instead of valuable Materials. Fake Armor cam be worn, but provides no Armor. It can be also used to decorate Armor Stands.
Yellow Dye -> 8x Gold
Cyan Dye -> 8x Diamond
Black Dye -> 8x Netherite
Light Gray Dye -> 8x Chainmail
Gray Dye -> 8x Iron
Brown Dye -> 8x Leather
Orange Dye -> 8x Copper
![Image showing how to craft a Fake Gold Chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4uPINRHL/images/a3320afad5b9ec9f87c119554164d263c121cdf2.png) ### Fake Turtle Shell ![Image Displaying Recipe for Fake Turtle Shell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/deb4c65d0e9cf0e2449f10a3daa69e70d5de3505.png) ### Fake Elytra ![Image Displaying Fake Elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dece011e4f74dc2f660b8383e06d90529b7ac7c1.png) ## 🛠️ Installation ### Datapack Installation Guide Copy the .zip archive into the ".minecraft/saves/__yourworldname__/datapacks" folder, where __yourworldname__ is the name of your world. ### Mod installation Guide Copy the .jar archive into the folder your Mod Loader of choice provides. ## ⚙️ Compatibility Previous to v1.3:Might not be compatible with certain Uncrafting/Recycling Mods that allow Armor to be converted back to their respective Materials efficiently. ## ❗Issues and Suggestions Please report issues on [My Discord](https://discord.gg/R2G6EMW42H).
